Motion For Reconsideration
Off Calendar Jan-29-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Ronald Galasi, (650)685-6200 of The Law office of Ronald Galasi for Plaintiff/Moving party Joseph Wakim via court call.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF JOSEPH WAKIM Motion For Reconsideration is DENIED. Plaintiff presents no new facts, circumstances or law, not considered by the Court at the time of the execution of the Order sustaining the demurrer without prejudice to re-file in Probate department, which is the proper forum for Plaintiff's complaint. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Reported: Katy Leonard CSR#11599 (415)472-2361. (501)

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ronald Galasi, ESq. (650-685-6200) for Plaintiff/Moving party Joseph Wakim.
Sean McCloskey, Esq. (707-539-5190) for Defendant/opposing party Fay Vassilakis and Lamis Malouf through Court Call.

The Court announces the tentative ruling. Counsel on Court Call hung up. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS FAY VASSILAKIS and LAMIS MALOUF's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED. The action shall be re-filed in probate department. The matter is sustained with leave to amend. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported (D501)
